member_authenticated.description: Indicates whether the Member has all of the factors needed to fully authenticate to this Organization. If false, the Member may need to complete an MFA step or complete a different primary authentication flow. See the `primary_required` and `mfa_required` fields for more details on each.

primary_required.description: Information about the primary authentication requirements of the Organization.

mfa_required.description: Information about the MFA requirements of the Organization and the Member's options for fulfilling MFA.
